
```{r}
sessionInfo()
```


```{r}
?install.packages()
```


```{r}
#| eval: FALSE
update.packages()
```


```{r}
install.packages("dplyr")
```


```{r}
?library()
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
```


```{r}
install.packages("BiocManager")
```

```{r}
library(BiocManager)
```


```{r}
?install()
```


```{r}
install("PeacoQC")
```


```{r}
library(PeacoQC)
```

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```


```{r}
installed.packages()
```


```{r}
install.packages("remotes")
```


```{r}

```


```{r}
library(remotes)
```


```{r}
install_github("hally166/flowSpectrum")
```
